name: Sync Pattern Guard
description: Before writing to hooks or lib/sync, verify the offline-first pattern is followed

then.prompt: If this write touches a hooks/use-*.ts file or lib/sync/*.ts, verify the offline-first pattern is followed: (1) Dexie write first with isDirty:true, (2) enqueue() called from lib/sync/engine.ts, (3) no direct server mutations without going through the sync queue. Also ensure no direct @prisma/client imports — always use lib/generated/prisma via @/lib/db.
